creator: kaj@hq.room33.com
text:
I just noticed the MAINTAINER field in gbuffy is set to an email
address I no longer have.  Please chage it to rasmus@kaj.se .  If anyone
who sees this have tried to contact me regarding gbuffy, I'm very sorry,
and please try again using the new address.

Fix: 

s/kaj@Raditex.se/rasmus@kaj.se/ in ports/mail/gbuffy/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
